title: Ability to Tag Yourself
excerpt: It would be awesome if you could tag YOURSELF in an update so that it shows up in your Inbox. I use my Inbox like a to-do list on things to follow up on, and during our staff meetings, it would be great to tag myself as …

posts.author: remawhirter (Rachel Mawhirter)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be awesome if you could tag YOURSELF in an update so that it shows up in your Inbox. I use my Inbox like a to-do list on things to follow up on, and during our staff meetings, it would be great to tag myself as a reminder to circle back to something.

posts.author: stefmullen (Stefanie Mullen)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get a response or a workaround? We desperately need to ability to tag yourself. We all assign so much work to ourselves. That’s the only way to create a true to do list.

posts.author: remawhirter (Rachel Mawhirter)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, no, we haven’t heard anything more about this. There are several features that I’m hoping will be added soon, and this is at the top of that list! We design all of our boards with status and deadline combos so that we can use the MyWork for to-do list, but inbox is such a nice backup and tagging ourselves would be so amazing.
